title: antidesma subbicolor
intro: Antidesma subbicolor, commonly known as the white-veined panialam or white-veined panialam creeper, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds. Antidesma subbicolor has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced wound healing. Herbal preparations of Antidesma subbicolor can be made into decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
